notes: Can also appear as a suffix '-weise' forming adverbs (e.g. 'glücklicherweise', 'stufenweise'). As a standalone adjective, it describes wisdom or sound judgment.

sentences.german: Der alte Mann gab mir einen weisen Rat.
sentences.english: The old man gave me a wise piece of advice.

sentences.german: Es wäre weiser, jetzt eine Pause zu machen.
sentences.english: It would be wiser to take a break now.
